verses.geez: ወከመዝ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ፍጥረቶሙ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወለአሮን ፡ በዕለተ ፡ ተናገሮ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ በደብረ ፡ ሲና ።

translations.lxx: And these are the generations of Aaron and Moses, in the day in which the Lord spoke to Moses in mount Sina.
translations.kjv: These also are the generations of Aaron and Moses in the day that the LORD spake with Moses in mount Sinai.

verses.geez: ወዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ አስማቲሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ አሮን ፡ በኵሩ ፡ ናዳብ ፡ ወአቢዩድ ፡ ወእልዓዛር ፡ ወይታመር ።

translations.lxx: And these are the names of the sons of Aaron; Nadab the first-born; and Abiud, Eleazar and Ithamar.
translations.kjv: And these are the names of the sons of Aaron; Nadab the firstborn, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.

verses.geez:
ወዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ አስማቲሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ አሮን ፡ ለካህናት ፡ እለ ፡ ቅቡኣን ፡ ወእለ ፡ ፍጹማን ፡ እደዊሆሙ ፡ ከመ
                  ፡ ይኩኑ ፡ ካህናተ ።

translations.lxx: These are the names of the sons of Aaron, the anointed priests whom they consecrated to the priesthood.
translations.kjv: These are the names of the sons of Aaron, the priests which were anointed, whom he consecrated to minister in the priest’s office.

verses.geez:
ወሞቱ ፡ ናዳብ ፡ ወአብዩድ ፡ በቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ እስመ ፡ አምጽኡ ፡ እሳተ ፡ ዘባዕድ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡
                  በሐቅለ ፡ ሲና ፡ ወአልቦሙ ፡ ውሉደ ፡ ወኮኑ ፡ ካህናተ ፡ እልዓዛር ፡ ወይታመር ፡ ምስለ ፡ አሮን ፡ አቡሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Nadab and Abiud died before the Lord, when they offered strange fire before the Lord, in the wilderness of Sina; and they had no children; and Eleazar and Ithamar ministered in the priests' office with Aaron their father.
translations.kjv: And Nadab and Abihu died before the LORD, when they offered strange fire before the LORD, in the wilderness of Sinai, and they had no children: and Eleazar and Ithamar ministered in the priest’s office in the sight of Aaron their father.

verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez: ንሥኦሙ ፡ ለነገደ ፡ ሌዊ ፡ ወአቅሞሙ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ አሮን ፡ ካህን ፡ ወይትለአክዎ ።

translations.lxx: Take the tribe of Levi, and thou shalt set them before Aaron the priest, and they shall minister to him,
translations.kjv: Bring the tribe of Levi near, and present them before Aaron the priest, that they may minister unto him.

verses.geez:
ወይዕቀቡ ፡ ሕጎ ፡ ወሕጎሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ በቅድመ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡል ፡ ወይግበሩ ፡ ምግባራቲሃ ፡ ለደብተራ
                  ።

translations.lxx: and shall keep his charges, and the charges of the children of Israel, before the tabernacle of witness, to do the works of the tabernacle.
translations.kjv: And they shall keep his charge, and the charge of the whole congregation before the tabernacle of the congregation, to do the service of the tabernacle.

verses.geez: ወይዕቀቡ ፡ ንዋያ ፡ ለደብተራ ፡ መርጡል ፡ ወሕጎሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ በኵሉ ፡ ምግባራቲሃ ፡ ለደብተራ ።

translations.lxx: And they shall keep all the furniture of the tabernacle of witness, and the charges of the children of Israel as to all the works of the tabernacle.
translations.kjv: And they shall keep all the instruments of the tabernacle of the congregation, and the charge of the children of Israel, to do the service of the tabernacle.

verses.geez:
ወታገብኦሙ ፡ ለሌዋውያን ፡ ኀበ ፡ አሮን ፡ እኁከ ፡ ወኀበ ፡ ደቂቁ ፡ ካህናት ፡ እስመ ፡ ሀብትየ ፡ ውሁባን ፡ ሊተ ፡
                  እሙንቱ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt give the Levites to Aaron, and to his sons the priests; they are given for a gift to me of the children of Israel.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt give the Levites unto Aaron and to his sons: they are wholly given unto him out of the children of Israel.

verses.geez:
ወትሠይሞሙ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ወለደቂቁ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡል ፡ ወይዕቀቡ ፡ ክህነቶሙ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ዘምሥዋዕ ፡
                  ወዘውስጥ ፡ እምነ ፡ መንጦላዕት ፡ ወእመቦ ፡ ዘገሰሰ ፡ ዘእምውስተ ፡ ባዕድ ፡ ዘመድ ፡ ለይሙት ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt appoint Aaron and his sons over the tabernacle of witness; and they shall keep their charge of priesthood, and all things belonging to the altar, and within the veil; and the stranger that touches them shall die.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt appoint Aaron and his sons, and they shall wait on their priest’s office: and the stranger that cometh nigh shall be put to death.

verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez:
ናሁ ፡ አነ ፡ ነሣእክዎሙ ፡ ለሌዋውያን ፡ እምነ ፡ ማእከሎሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ህየንተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ በኵር ፡
                  ዘይፈትሕ ፡ ማኅፀነ ፡ ዘእምኀበ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ቤዛ ፡ ዚአሆሙ ፡ ይኩኑኒ ፡ ሌዋውያን ፡ (ይቤ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡)፡
                  እስመ ፡ ለት ፡ ቀደስኩ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ በኵረ ፡ በምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፤ ኵሉ ፡ በኵር ፡ ዘእምውስተ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እምነ ፡ ሰብእ ፡
                  እስከ ፡ እንስሳ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ እስመ ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: Behold, I have taken the Levites from the midst of the children of Israel, instead of every male that opens the womb from among the children of Israel: they shall be their ransom, and the Levites shall be mine.
translations.kjv: And I, behold, I have taken the Levites from among the children of Israel instead of all the firstborn that openeth the matrix among the children of Israel: therefore the Levites shall be mine;

verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ በሐቅለ ፡ ሲና ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: For every first-born is mine; in the day in which I smote every first-born in the land of Egypt, I sanctified to myself every first-born in Israel: both of man and beast, they shall be mine: I am the Lord.
translations.kjv: Because all the firstborn are mine; for on the day that I smote all the firstborn in the land of Egypt I hallowed unto me all the firstborn in Israel, both man and beast: mine shall they be: I am the LORD.

verses.geez:
ኈልቆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ሌዊ ፡ በበ ፡ አብያተ ፡ አበዊሆሙ ፡ ወበበ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ ወበበ ፡ አዝማዲሆሙ ፤ ኵሉ ፡ ተባዕቶሙ
                  ፡ ዘእምነ ፡ ወርኅ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ወላዕሉ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ ኈልቆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses in the wilderness of Sina, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses in the wilderness of Sinai, saying,

verses.geez: ወኈለቍዎሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወአሮን ፡ በቃለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዞሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: Take the number of the sons of Levi, according to the houses of their families, according to their divisions; number ye them every male from a month old and upwards.
translations.kjv: Number the children of Levi after the house of their fathers, by their families: every male from a month old and upward shalt thou number them.

verses.geez: ወበበ ፡ አስማቲሆሙ ፡ ውእቶሙ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ሌዊ ፡ ጌድሶን ፡ ወቃዓት ፡ ወሜራሪ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses and Aaron numbered them by the word of the Lord, as the Lord commanded them.
translations.kjv: And Moses numbered them according to the word of the LORD, as he was commanded.

verses.geez: ወዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ አስማቲሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ጌድሶን ፡ በበሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ ሎቤን ፡ ወሴሜይ ።

translations.lxx: And these were the sons of Levi by their names; Gedson, Caath, and Merari.
translations.kjv: And these were the sons of Levi by their names; Gershon, and Kohath, and Merari.

verses.geez: ወደቂቁኒ ፡ ለቃዓት ፡ በበሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ አንብረም ፡ ወይ[ሰዓ]ር ፡ ወኬብሮን ፡ ወኦዚሔል ።

translations.lxx: And these are the names of the sons of Gedson according to their families; Lobeni and Semei:
translations.kjv: And these are the names of the sons of Gershon by their families; Libni, and Shimei.

verses.geez: ወደቂቁኒ ፡ ለሜራሪ ፡ በበሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ ሞሖሊ ፡ ወሖሙሲ ፤

translations.lxx: and the sons of Caath according to their families; Amram and Issaar, Chebron and Oziel:
translations.kjv: And the sons of Kohath by their families; Amram, and Izehar, Hebron, and Uzziel.

verses.geez: ዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ ለሌዋውያን ፡ በበአብያተ ፡ አበዊሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: and the sons of Merari according to their families, Mooli and Musi; these are the families of the Levites according to the houses of their families.
translations.kjv: And the sons of Merari by their families; Mahli, and Mushi. These are the families of the Levites according to the house of their fathers.

verses.geez: ዘጌድሶን ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ ሎቤን ፡ ወሕዝበ ፡ ሴሜይ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ዘጌድሶን ።

translations.lxx: To Gedson belongs the family of Lobeni, and the family of Semei: these are the families of Gedson.
translations.kjv: Of Gershon was the family of the Libnites, and the family of the Shimites: these are the families of the Gershonites.

verses.geez: ወዘአስተፋቀዱ ፡ ኍልቈ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ተባዕቶሙ ፡ ዘእምነ ፡ ፩ወርኅ ፡ ወላዕሉ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ ኍልቊሆሙ ፡ ፸፻፭፻ ።

translations.lxx: The numbering of them according to the number of every male from a month old and upwards, their numbering was seven thousand and five hundred.
translations.kjv: Those that were numbered of them, according to the number of all the males, from a month old and upward, even those that were numbered of them were seven thousand and five hundred.

verses.geez: ወየኀድሩ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ጌድሶን ፡ ድኅረ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ገጸ ፡ ባሕር ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Gedson shall encamp westward behind the tabernacle.
translations.kjv: The families of the Gershonites shall pitch behind the tabernacle westward.

verses.geez: ወመልአኮሙ ፡ ለቤተ ፡ አቡሆሙ ፡ ለሕዝበ ፡ ጌድሶን ፡ ኤሊሳፍ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዳሔል ።

translations.lxx: And the ruler of the household of the family of Gedson was Elisaph the son of Dael.
translations.kjv: And the chief of the house of the father of the Gershonites shall be Eliasaph the son of Lael.

verses.geez:
ወዘይትሐበዩ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ጌድሶን ፡ በውስተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡል ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ወመክደና ፡ ወመንጦላዕተ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡
                  ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡል ፤

translations.lxx: And the charge of the sons of Gedson in the tabernacle of witness was the tent and the veil, and the covering of the door of the tabernacle of witness,
translations.kjv: And the charge of the sons of Gershon in the tabernacle of the congregation shall be the tabernacle, and the tent, the covering thereof, and the hanging for the door of the tabernacle of the congregation,

verses.geez: ወአልባሰ ፡ ዐጸድ ፡ ወመንጦላዕት ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ አንቀጽ ፡ ዘዐጸድ ፡ ዘኀበ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ወዘተርፈ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምግባራቲሁ ።

translations.lxx: and the curtains of the court, and the veil of the door of the court, which is by the tabernacle, and the remainder of all its works.
translations.kjv: And the hangings of the court, and the curtain for the door of the court, which is by the tabernacle, and by the altar round about, and the cords of it for all the service thereof.

verses.geez:
ወዘቃዓትኒ ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ አንብረም ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ወሕዝበ ፡ ሰኣር ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ወሕዝበ ፡ ኬብሮን ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ወሕዝበ ፡ ኦዚሔል
                  ፡ አሐዱ ።

translations.lxx: To Caath belonged one division, that of Amram, and another division, that of Issaar, and another division, that of Chebron, and another division, that of Oziel: these are the divisions of Caath, according to number.
translations.kjv: And of Kohath was the family of the Amramites, and the family of the Izeharites, and the family of the Hebronites, and the family of the Uzzielites: these are the families of the Kohathites.

verses.geez:
እሉ ፡ ውእቶሙ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ዘቃዓት ፡ በበ ፡ ኍልቈ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ተባዕቶሙ ፡ ዘእምነ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ወርኅ ፡ ወላዕሉ ፡ እምኔሁ
                  ፡ ፹፻፯፻ወየዐቅቡ ፡ ሕጎሙ ፡ ለቅዱሳን ።

translations.lxx: Every male from a month old and upward, eight thousand and six hundred, keeping the charges of the holy things.
translations.kjv: In the number of all the males, from a month old and upward, were eight thousand and six hundred, keeping the charge of the sanctuary.

verses.geez: ወየኀድሩ ፡ ሕዝቦሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ቃዓት ፡ እምገቦሃ ፡ ለደብተራ ፡ ለመንገለ ፡ አዜብ ።

translations.lxx: The families of the sons of Caath, shall encamp beside the tabernacle toward the south.
translations.kjv: The families of the sons of Kohath shall pitch on the side of the tabernacle southward.

verses.geez: ወመልአኮሙ ፡ ለቤተ ፡ አቡሆሙ ፡ ለሕዝበ ፡ ቃዓት ፡ ኤሊሳፈን ፡ ወልደ ፡ ኦዚሔል ።

translations.lxx: And the chief of the house of the families of the divisions of Caath, was Elisaphan the son of Oziel.
translations.kjv: And the chief of the house of the father of the families of the Kohathites shall be Elizaphan the son of Uzziel.

verses.geez:
ወዘይትሐበዩ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ታቦተ ፡ ወማእደ ፡ ወመራናተ ፡ ወመሥዋዕተ ፡ ወንዋያተ ፡ ዘቅድሳት ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዘይገብሩ ፡ ቦቱ
                  ፡ ወመካድንተ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ምግባራተ ።

translations.lxx: And their charge was the ark, and the table, and the candlestick, and the altars, and all the vessels of the sanctuary wherewith they do holy service, and the veil, and all their works.
translations.kjv: And their charge shall be the ark, and the table, and the candlestick, and the altars, and the vessels of the sanctuary wherewith they minister, and the hanging, and all the service thereof.

verses.geez:
ወመልአክ ፡ ዘዲበ ፡ መሳፍንቲሆሙ ፡ ለሌዋውያን ፡ እልዓዛር ፡ ወልደ ፡ አሮን ፡ ካህን ፡ ዘተሠይመ ፡ ይዕቀብ ፡ ሕጎሙ ፡
                  ለቅዱሳን ።

translations.lxx: And the chief over the chief of the Levites, was Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest, appointed to keep the charges of the holy things.
translations.kjv: And Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest shall be chief over the chief of the Levites, and have the oversight of them that keep the charge of the sanctuary.

verses.geez: ወዘሜራሪኒ ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ ሞሖሊ ፡ ወሕዝበ ፡ ሖሙሲ ፡ እሉ ፡ ውእቶሙ ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ ሜራሪ ።

translations.lxx: To Merari belonged the family of Mooli, and the family of Musi: these are the families of Merari.
translations.kjv: Of Merari was the family of the Mahlites, and the family of the Mushites: these are the families of Merari.

verses.geez: ወኍለቊሆሙኒ ፡ በከመ ፡ አስተፋቀድዎሙ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ተባዕቶሙ ፡ ዘእም፩ወርኅ ፡ ወላዕሉ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ ፷፻፶ ።

translations.lxx: The mustering of them according to number, every male from a month old and upwards, was six thousand and fifty.
translations.kjv: And those that were numbered of them, according to the number of all the males, from a month old and upward, were six thousand and two hundred.

verses.geez:
ወመልአኮሙ ፡ ለቤተ ፡ አቡሆሙ ፡ ለሕዝበ ፡ ሜራሪ ፡ ሱሪሔል ፡ ወልደ ፡ አቢኪያ ፡ ወየኀድሩ ፡ እምገቦሃ ፡ ለደብተራ ፡
                  ዘመንገለ ፡ መስዕ ።

translations.lxx: And the head of the house of the families of the division of Merari, was Suriel the son of Abichail: they shall encamp by the side of the tabernacle northwards.
translations.kjv: And the chief of the house of the father of the families of Merari was Zuriel the son of Abihail: these shall pitch on the side of the tabernacle northward.

verses.geez:
ወ[ዘ]ይትሐበዩ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ሜራሪ ፡ አርእስተ ፡ አዕማድ ፡ ዘደብተራ ፡ ወመናስግቲሃ ፡ ወአዕማዲሃ ፡ ወመካይዲሆን
                  ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ንዋዮን ፡ ወምግባራቲሆን ፤

translations.lxx: The oversight of the charge of the sons of Merari included the chapiters of the tabernacle, and its bars, and its pillars, and its sockets, and all their furniture, and their works,
translations.kjv: And under the custody and charge of the sons of Merari shall be the boards of the tabernacle, and the bars thereof, and the pillars thereof, and the sockets thereof, and all the vessels thereof, and all that serveth thereto,

verses.geez: ወአዕማድ ፡ ዘዐውደ ፡ ዐጸድ ፡ ወመካይዲሆን ፡ ወመታክሊሆን ፡ ወመታግሪሆን ።

translations.lxx: and the pillars of the court round about, and their bases, and their pins, and their cords.
translations.kjv: And the pillars of the court round about, and their sockets, and their pins, and their cords.

verses.geez:
ወእ[ለ]ሰ ፡ የኀድሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ድብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡል ፡ እመንገለ ፡ [ጽባሕ ፡] ሙሴ ፡ ወአሮን ፡ ወደቂቁ ፡
                  ከመ ፡ ይዕቀቡ ፡ ሕጎ ፡ ለቅዱስ ፡ በሕጎሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወእመቦ ፡ ዘገሰሰ ፡ ዘእምውስተ ፡ ባዕድ ፡ ዘመድ ፡
                  ለይሙት ።

translations.lxx: They that encamp before the tabernacle of witness on the east shall be Moses and Aaron and his sons, keeping the charges of the sanctuary according to the charges of the children of Israel; and the stranger that touches them, shall die.
translations.kjv: But those that encamp before the tabernacle toward the east, even before the tabernacle of the congregation eastward, shall be Moses, and Aaron and his sons, keeping the charge of the sanctuary for the charge of the children of Israel; and the stranger that cometh nigh shall be put to death.

verses.geez:
ኵሉ ፡ ኍለቊሆሙ ፡ ለሌዋውያን ፡ ዘኈለቁ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወአሮን ፡ በቃለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በበ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ ኵሉ ፡
                  ተባዕቶሙ ፡ ዘእም፩ወርኅ ፡ ወላዕሉ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ ፪፻-፻፳፻ ።

translations.lxx: All the numbering of the Levites, whom Moses and Aaron numbered by the word of the Lord, according to their families, every male from a month old and upwards, were two and twenty thousand.
translations.kjv: All that were numbered of the Levites, which Moses and Aaron numbered at the commandment of the LORD, throughout their families, all the males from a month old and upward, were twenty and two thousand.

verses.geez:
ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ኈልቍ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ በኵሮሙ ፡ ተባዕተ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ዘእም፩ወርኅ ፡
                  ወላዕሉ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ ወአእምር ፡ ኍለቊሆሙ ፡ በበ ፡ አስማቲሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying, Count every first-born male of the children of Israel from a month old and upwards, and take the number by name.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Moses, Number all the firstborn of the males of the children of Israel from a month old and upward, and take the number of their names.

verses.geez:
ወታገብኦሙ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ለሌዋውያን ፡ እስመ ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ህየንተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ በኵሮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡
                  ወእንስሳሆሙኒ ፡ ለሌዋውያን ፡ ህየንተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ በኵረ ፡ እንስሳሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt take the Levites for me—I am the Lord—instead of all the first-born of the sons of Israel, and the cattle of the Levites instead of all the first-born among the cattle of the children of Israel.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt take the Levites for me (I am the LORD) instead of all the firstborn among the children of Israel; and the cattle of the Levites instead of all the firstlings among the cattle of the children of Israel.

verses.geez: ወኈለቆሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ በኵሮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዞ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And Moses counted, as the Lord commanded him, every first-born among the children of Israel.
translations.kjv: And Moses numbered, as the LORD commanded him, all the firstborn among the children of Israel.

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ በኵረ ፡ ተባዕት ፡ በበኍልቈ ፡ አስማቲሆሙ ፡ ዘእም፩ወርኅ ፡ ወላዕሉ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ ኮነ ፡ ኍለቊሆሙ ፡
                  ፪፻-፻፳፻፪፻፸[፫] ።

translations.lxx: And all the male first-born in number by name, from a month old and upwards, were according to their numbering twenty-two thousand and two hundred and seventy-three.
translations.kjv: And all the firstborn males by the number of names, from a month old and upward, of those that were numbered of them, were twenty and two thousand two hundred and threescore and thirteen.

verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez:
ንሥኦሙ ፡ ለሌዋውያን ፡ ህየንተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ በኵሮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወእንስሳሆሙኒ ፡ ለሌዋውያን ፡ ህየንተ ፡ ኵሉ
                  ፡ እንስሳሆሙ ፡ ወይኩኑኒ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ሌዋውያን ፡ እስመ ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: Take the Levites instead of all the first-born of the sons of Israel, and the cattle of the Levites instead of their cattle, and the Levites shall be mine; I am the Lord.
translations.kjv: Take the Levites instead of all the firstborn among the children of Israel, and the cattle of the Levites instead of their cattle; and the Levites shall be mine: I am the LORD.

verses.geez: ወቤዛሆሙኒ ፡ ለእልክቱ ፡ ፪፻፸[፫]እለ ፡ ፈድፈደ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሌዋውያን ፡ በኵሮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And for the ransoms of the two hundred and seventy-three which exceed the Levites in number of the first-born of the sons of Israel;
translations.kjv: And for those that are to be redeemed of the two hundred and threescore and thirteen of the firstborn of the children of Israel, which are more than the Levites;

verses.geez: ትነሥእ ፡ ለለ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ በዲድርክሙ ፡ ዘቅዱስ ፡ ትነሥእ ፡ ዕሥራ ፡ [ኦቦ]ሊ ፡ ዘሰቅሎ ።

translations.lxx: thou shalt even take five shekels a head; thou shalt take them according to the holy didrachm, twenty oboli to the shekel.
translations.kjv: Thou shalt even take five shekels apiece by the poll, after the shekel of the sanctuary shalt thou take them: (the shekel is twenty gerahs:)

verses.geez: ወትሁቦሙ ፡ ወርቆ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ወለደቂቁ ፡ ቤዛሆሙ ፡ ለእለ ፡ ፈድፈዱ ፡ እምኔሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt give the money to Aaron and to his sons, the ransom of those who exceed in number among them.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt give the money, wherewith the odd number of them is to be redeemed, unto Aaron and to his sons.

verses.geez:
ወነሥአ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ውእተ ፡ ወርቀ ፡ ዘቤዛሆሙ ፡ ለእለ ፡ ፈድፈዱ ፡ እምነ ፡ ቤዛሆሙ ፡ ለሌዋውያን ፡ ዘበኵሮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ
                  ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And Moses took the silver, the ransom of those that exceeded in number the redemption of the Levites.
translations.kjv: And Moses took the redemption money of them that were over and above them that were redeemed by the Levites:

verses.geez: ወነሥአ ፡ ወርቀ ፡ ፲፻[፫]፻፷፭ሰቅሎ ፡ በሰቅሎ ፡ ዘቅዱስ ።

translations.lxx: He took the silver from the first-born of the sons of Israel, a thousand three hundred and sixty-five shekels, according to the holy shekel.
translations.kjv: Of the firstborn of the children of Israel took he the money; a thousand three hundred and threescore and five shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary:

verses.geez:
ወወሀበ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ውእተ ፡ ወርቀ ፡ ዘቤዛሆሙ ፡ ለእለ ፡ ፈድፈዱ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ወለደቂቁ ፡ በቃለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በከመ
                  ፡ አዘዞ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses gave the ransom of them that were over to Aaron and his sons, by the word of the Lord, as the Lord commanded Moses.
translations.kjv: And Moses gave the money of them that were redeemed unto Aaron and to his sons, according to the word of the LORD, as the LORD commanded Moses.
